name: moodist
title: Moodist
description: Ambient sound mixer for focus and relaxation. Layer multiple sounds, save presets, and control from your menu bar.
author: chandlervdw

commands.name: mix-sounds
commands.title: Mix Sounds
commands.description: Browse and mix ambient sounds with individual volume control

commands.name: toggle-playback
commands.title: Toggle Playback
commands.description: Play or pause the current sound mix

commands.name: menu-bar
commands.title: Moodist Menu Bar
commands.description: Persistent menu bar controls for Moodist

commands.name: manage-presets
commands.title: Manage Presets
commands.description: Save, load, and delete sound mix presets

commands.name: set-timer
commands.title: Set Sleep Timer
commands.description: Set an auto-stop timer for the current mix

preferences.name: defaultVolume
preferences.title: Default Volume
preferences.description: Default volume when adding a new sound (0-100)

preferences.name: showMenuBarCount
preferences.title: Show Sound Count in Menu Bar
preferences.description: Display the number of active sounds next to the menu bar icon
preferences.label: Show count
